## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and conversion optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic growth continues, with design and development pages performing well](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Shift focus to connecting high-traffic blog content with capabilities pages to improve pipeline generation](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Experiment with updated conversion panels on bottom-funnel content to drive more meaningful engagement](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [New thought leadership content being produced to showcase Webstacks' perspective and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Google core update rolling out, expected to complete by early April](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Slight increase in clicks, but no dramatic changes yet](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Internal linking improvements made to address orphan pages](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Some blogs (10-15) have lost significant traffic over time, not due to algorithm changes](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Focus on curating existing content ecosystem rather than producing high volumes of new content](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating embedded pillars on capabilities pages](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Goal: Connect high-traffic blog content to pipeline-generating pages (capabilities, solutions, use cases)](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Experiment with pushing traffic from lower-funnel blog content to capabilities pages](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Current email nurture program is basic and not particularly strong](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Most bottom-funnel conversions happen within single sessions](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Short-term experiment: Add more targeted conversion panels (e.g., "Book a Call") to bottom-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Prioritize learning about user journeys and quality of traffic over raw lead volume](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

### New Thought Leadership Content

  - [Short-form blog posts sharing insights from stakeholder interviews (e.g., CTO of Gong, CPO of Drata)](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Not SEO-optimized, but meant to showcase Webstacks' perspective and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Can be incorporated into longer-form blog content and used for social media posts](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jacob and Aida to sync and develop a plan for improving conversion panels on existing content](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)
  - [Devon to share custom conversion panels for each technology](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Team to review pillar page content and decide on priorities for next week](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Aida to conduct keyword gap analysis for design and development keywords](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Devon to share list of content competitors and agency blogs for competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Team to review and potentially implement recommendations for moving/pruning SEO-related content](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Continue producing and sharing thought leadership content for potential incorporation into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/MRaDGXjfy4s2EKWnuBBmjGrJ_NVzgP8y?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
